system.flavor: Dark aether coats your blade, preparing final rest for your foe.
system.effect:
Effect your turn and gain stealth. Your next attack gains:
• On hit your foe is in crisis, they must save or take piercing damage equal to 25% of their max hp, or 2 piercing damage on a successful save. If they are not in crisis, they take 2 piercing damage instead.
• Effect characters take 2 piercing damage on hit instead of the above effect, or 6 piercing on a failed save if they are in crisis.
Afflicted gains [-] on the save

(Afflicted bonuses if your foe is suffering from a status.)
